nav.info-content: This website was created by the dorm commitee (HV) of K3 and is not an official service of Studierendenwerk Mainz.

repairs.title: Repairs & Maintenance
repairs.text: Report any issues through the Tenant Portal and track the repair progress. Most fixes are free unless you caused major damage.
repairs.text2: If your door lock flashes red and yellow at the same time (orange), the battery is running low. Please report it.
repairs.esp1: For urgent problems outside caretaker hours
repairs.esp2: No charge if it’s a technical fault
repairs.esp3: Costs apply if the lockout was caused by the resident (e.g., lost key | 150€ SoSe 26)

service.title: Life in K3: The Basics
service.smoke: Smoke detectors must not be manipulated by tenants (150€ penalty)
service.windows: Windows and balcony doors can not be opened in tilt position
service.laundry: The laundry room is in House 4 (payment via the Studierendenwerk app).
service.trash: Trash and recycling areas are located near House 4 and House 18.

parking.title: Parking
parking.text: Resident parking is available on Lucy-Hillebrand-Straße.
parking.text2: If no spaces are available, you can use parking on the university Mainz garage.
parking.bike: There is a locked bike storage area where you can safely park your bicycle.
parking.games: Access roads are closed during football matches.

HV.title: Volunteering & Community
HV.esp1: Organizes events, runs the K3 Bar, and represents residents.
HV.esp2: Elections take place each semester during the General Assembly. Every K3 resident can run for election.
HV.esp3: Feel free to join, bring ideas or raise concerns in the weekly HV Meetings.
HV.text: You can get involved by joining the Bar Team, helping in working groups, or starting your own project.

NAG.title: NAG (Network Group)
NAG.text: Residents who help others with internet setup and minor connection issues.
NAG.text2: You can join as a volunteer too.

what.title: What is the HV?
what.text1: The HV is the resident council of the dorm, aka the people who try to make K3 more than just a place to sleep.
what.text2: From bar nights and parties to helping new residents settle in, we try to create a place where people actually know their neighbors. We’re a group of residents who volunteer to organize events, improve dorm life, and represent your interests at the Studierendenwerk. Right now, we’re around 12 active members doing our best to make K3 a bit more fun, social, and alive.

tasks.title: What do we do?
tasks.text1: We take care of things like:
tasks.esp1: making dorm life more social and enjoyable
tasks.esp2: representing your interests to the Studierendenwerk Mainz
tasks.esp6: looking after common spaces and improve them

join.title: How can you join us?
join.text2: Show up at the VV (Vollversammlung), introduce yourself, and get elected. No experience needed — just bring ideas, motivation, and maybe a bit of courage

VV.title: What is VV (Vollversammlung)?
VV.text: The VV is the big dorm meeting where everyone gets a say. It’s the highest decision-making space in K3. It usually happens once per semester, and everyone living in K3 can join. That's where:
VV.esp3: decisions about dorm life are made

bar.title: K3 Bar
bar.text: The K3 Bar is a central meeting place organized by the HV with regular events.
bar.esp1: regular bar evenings (usually Fridays from 9:00 PM)
bar.esp3: A place to meet people beyond your hallway
bar.text2: You can also reserve the bar for birthdays or private events (if an HV member is available to open it).

AG.title: AG's (Working Groups)
AG.text: Not ready to join the HV? No problem. AG’s are smaller groups where you can get involved in specific things like sports, culture, or tech.
AG.esp3: a chill way to contribute and meet people

contact.title: How to contact us?
contact.esp1: during our weekly meetings (tuesdays 8:30 pm at the bar)

social.title: Social Media
social.info: WhatsApp and Instagram are organized by the resident committee (HV) and are independent from Studierendenwerk Mainz.

nag.title: Netzwerk AG (NAG)
nag.info: Residents who help others with internet setup and minor connection issues.

sw.title: Studierendenwerk
sw.menu: Menu for all Studiwerk Mainz dining halls

bar.title: Bar AG
bar.text1: The Bar AG organizes events and runs the K3 bar.
bar.text2: It is a central place for socializing and parties.

garden.title: Garden AG
garden.text1: The Garden AG takes care of the outdoor areas.
garden.text2: They maintain plants and improve the environment.

new.title: Start Your Own AG
new.text: Didn’t find an activity group that suits you? Why not start your own! If you have an idea, simply contact the HV and discuss it with them. You’ll receive support to bring your project to life and create your own group.
new.esp2: supported by the HV and the Studierendenwerk
new.esp3: a relaxed way to get involved and meet new people
new.esp4: counts as a voluntary activity and can help extend your stay
